name: LeRobot Loader
description: Data loader for LeRobot v2.x and v3.0 datasets: flattened numeric series + per-camera video on a shared timeline. v3.0 datasets use a consolidated per-shard Parquet/MP4 layout with relational metadata; the plugin reads meta/episodes/*.parquet to resolve each episode's row range and clip window.
author: PlotJuggler Team
